---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped research or engineering improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or engineering problem does this solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## MVP Impact

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Does not affect MVP chain
- [ ] Affects DSL
- [ ] Affects red-line validation
- [ ] Affects preview
- [ ] Affects Light Backtest
- [ ] Affects audit/storage

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Clear expected behavior
- [ ] Tests or validation command identified
- [ ] No investment advice, stock recommendation, real trading, or profit claim

## Non-Goals

What should this feature explicitly not do?
